_comment: NPC: 2nd-Gen Vermilion Bird / Young Emperor of the Fallen Land. Canon ID: N52. The 2nd-Generation Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor; also called Young Emperor of the Fallen Land. Helped Wang Lin through the Young Emperor trial; fished for a dragon and gifted its blood; taught Wang Lin the Dao of Strength; stood up for Wang Lin at the Trial of Heaven; taught Wang Lin one of the three supreme Vermilion Bird techniques; asked Wang Lin to take care of Zhong Dahong (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md N52, L78; CANON_RI_CHARACTER_DECISIONS.md CD-20; CANON_RI_EDGE_OF_CANON.md IR-09). Per user directive: every miscellaneous NPC from RI must be accounted for. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: 2nd-Gen Vermilion Bird (Young Emperor of the Fallen Land)
cultivation: Void Flame Cultivator (2nd-Gen Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor)
personality: imperial mentor; protective of trial-takers; weighted by duty
relationship_to_wanglin: ally; mentor (helped Wang Lin through Young Emperor trial)

perception_tiers.qi_condensation: Vermilion Bird Master; overwhelming fire aura
perception_tiers.core_formation: 2nd-Gen Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor; Void Flame Cultivator
perception_tiers.nascent_soul: Young Emperor of the Fallen Land; helped Wang Lin pass the trial
perception_tiers.spirit_severing: 2nd-Gen Divine Emperor; taught Wang Lin the Dao of Strength and a supreme Vermilion Bird technique

note: 2nd-Gen Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor; Young Emperor of the Fallen Land. Helped Wang Lin through the Young Emperor trial; gifted dragon blood; taught Dao of Strength; stood up for Wang Lin at the Trial of Heaven; taught one of the three supreme Vermilion Bird techniques; asked Wang Lin to take care of Zhong Dahong. Source: CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md N52, L78; CANON_RI_CHARACTER_DECISIONS.md CD-20; CANON_RI_EDGE_OF_CANON.md IR-09.

dao_heart.note: 0-100. A cracked Dao heart blocks breakthrough regardless of Qi. Per canon: Wang Lin's Dao heart is famously tested at every major realm.

initiation_lines: You have entered the Fallen Land. Few survive the trial. Fewer still earn my attention. You have earned it. I am the Second Generation Vermilion Bird Divine Emperor. This trial will test not your strength, but your resolve.
Wang Lin passed this trial. He did not pass because he was the strongest. He passed because he refused to stop. Strength without resolve is fire without fuel. I have seen both fail.
I gave Wang Lin dragon blood and taught him the Dao of Strength. He asked me to look after Zhong Dahong. A small request from a man who had just proven he deserved anything he asked for.
Blaze rods and dragon breath. If you wish to attempt the Young Emperor trial, you will need fire-aspected materials to fuel the array. Bring them and I will assess your worthiness.

daily_schedule.action: Review trial records of past candidates
Commune with the Vermilion Bird flame remnant

sect_tasks.name: Young Emperor Trial Preparation
sect_tasks.description: The 2nd Generation Divine Emperor needs blaze rods and experience bottles to prepare the Young Emperor trial array for the next candidate.

sect_tasks.name: Dao of Strength Instruction
sect_tasks.description: The 2nd Generation teaches fragments of the Dao of Strength to worthy cultivators. Bring iron and books to demonstrate your foundation.
